idea-plugin.name: KQL LSP
idea-plugin.description: Language support for KQL (Kusto Query Language) files powered by the KQL LSP server. Provides diagnostics, hover info, completion, and other language features for .kql files.

server.name: KQL LSP Server
server.description: A language server for KQL (Kusto Query Language) files. Provides diagnostics, hover, completion, and other language features.
